who.subtitle: Who We Are
who.title: Empowering communities for a better future
who.lead: Zahal Empowerment and Community Development Foundation is a not-for-profit, non-political organisation registered in Nigeria, based in Yola, Adamawa State.
who.body: We implement programmes and fund community-led initiatives that improve health, education, livelihood and environmental sustainability — while promoting human rights and building partnerships that make lasting change possible for the people who need it most.

objectives.subtitle: Our Aims & Objectives
objectives.title: What we set out to do

items.title: Health, Education & Livelihood
items.text: Implement programmes and projects that improve health, education, livelihood and environmental sustainability.

items.title: Community-Led Initiatives
items.text: Support and fund community-led initiatives that address local challenges.

items.title: Human Rights
items.text: Promote human rights awareness and protection for all, especially vulnerable populations.

items.title: Partnerships
items.text: Build partnerships with government, non-profits and the private sector for coordinated development efforts.

items.title: Advocacy & Awareness
items.text: Engage in advocacy and public awareness that foster inclusive and sustainable social development.
